mapper.delete: delete from stock_company_relation where code = #{code} and relation_type = #{relationType}
mapper.insert:
insert into stock_company_relation(code, related_code, related_name, relation_type, sort_order, source, create_time) values
(#{item.code}, #{item.relatedCode}, #{item.relatedName}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.source}, now())
mapper.select: select id, code, related_code as relatedCode, related_name as relatedName, relation_type as relationType, sort_order as sortOrder, source from stock_company_relation where code = #{code} order by sort_order asc, id asc

select id, code, related_code as relatedCode, related_name as relatedName, relation_type as relationType, sort_order as sortOrder, source from stock_company_relation where code = #{code} and relation_type = #{relationType} order by sort_order asc, id asc
